name: Zuppa Matta (Bread Salad with Tomatoes, Fennel & Celery)
recipeIngredient: 1 Red onion, finely sliced & soaked in cold water for 1 to 2 hours
1 Red bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, finely diced
2 Handful small black olives in brine
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the slices of bread in cold water to cover until moist, 10 to 15 minutes.
2. Squeeze each slice between your fingers to get rid of extra moisture.
3. Tear into small chunks.
4. Place the bread in a large bowl and add the onion, tomatoes, cucumber, celery, fennel, pepper, radishes, olives, and basil leaves.
5. Mix the vinegar and oil, adding lots of salt and pepper.
6. Pour over salad and serve at room temperature.
